title: Bad C++ (error: 'vlSelf' was not declared in this scope)

features.name: task with repeat loop and timing enabled
features.description: Code should include a task containing a repeat statement, used in timing-enabled context (verilator --timing flag)

features.name: fork inside task with hierarchical access
features.description: Code should include a fork statement inside a task, with access to a deeply nested module hierarchy
features.snippet:
task my_task;
  fork
    begin
      #1;
    end
  join
endtask

features.name: task with repeat in nested module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a task with repeat statement, located inside a deeply nested module hierarchy with long dot-separated path
